attributes.action: Deport failed asylum seekers as a matter of course
attributes.additional_details: Immigration is putting enormous strain on housing and services and is also proving decisive. Knowing that illegal migrants will be deported will help ease the public's concerns.
attributes.background: If people come to this country illegally and are not refugees. They should be automatically deported

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign this petition which calls for a similar action:
Detain, detect and deport all illegal immigrants: https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/761984
